message:
feat(ingest): Add OutputCache and enhance CapturedSegment

Add memory-efficient output deduplication and improve segment tracking.

OutputCache for deduplication:
- Dual-mechanism deduplication: per-pane rolling hash state + global LRU
- is_new(): Returns true only for genuinely new content, enabling skip
  of redundant processing
- Global LRU (configurable capacity) deduplicates across panes
- Per-pane state tracks content hash + length for fast local checks
- prune()/prune_stale(): Remove entries older than max_age
- Statistics: hit_rate(), stats(), reset_stats()
- remove_pane(), clear() for explicit cache management

OutputCacheConfig:
- global_lru_capacity: Max hashes in cross-pane cache (default 1024)
- per_pane_max_age_ms: Staleness threshold (default 5 minutes)

CapturedSegment changes:
- Add captured_at timestamp field (epoch ms) for precise timing
- Update all capture code paths to populate timestamp

PaneCursor enhancements:
- last_seq(): Get last assigned sequence number (-1 if none)
- capture(): Alias for capture_snapshot() for backward compatibility
- All capture methods now include captured_at in segments

Comprehensive test suite for OutputCache including hit/miss tracking,
LRU eviction, per-pane deduplication, stale pruning, and hash collision
resistance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
